scripts.dev: (npx kill-port 8000 5001 5173 5174 5175 >NUL 2>&1 || echo Ports already free) && concurrently -k -n "api,ws,web" -c "cyan,magenta,green" "php growe-backend-laravel-app/artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=8000" "npm --prefix growe-backend run dev" "npm --prefix growe-frontend run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173"
